event: Chu King Liu Wu's Donghai Commandery confiscated for impropriety during mourning
Wu's Yuzhang and Kuaiji Commanderies ordered confiscated

date: Emperor Jing Year 3, 1st Month, Bingwu Day
event: Jiaoxi King kills Han officials below 2000-shi rank; rebellion begins

date: Emperor Jing Year 3, 1st Month, Jiazi Day
event: Wu King Liu Bi raises army at Guangling, crosses Huai River
Wu army defeated; Liu Bi flees to Dongyue
Liu Bi killed by Dongyue assassins; his sons flee to Minyue
Siege of Linzi lifted; rebel kings in Qi region defeated
Zhao King Liu Sui defeated, commits suicide
